# Protocol Compliance Test
# Tests protocol compliance using static validation

exec echo "Testing protocol compliance"

# Test protocol version validation
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"initialize\", \"params\": {\"protocolVersion\": \"2025-03-26\", \"capabilities\": {}}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"protocolVersion": "2025-03-26"'
stdout '"capabilities"'

# Test method name validation  
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"tools/list\"}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"tools/list"'

# Test tool invocation format
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"test_tool\", \"arguments\": {}}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"tools/call"'
stdout '"test_tool"'

exec echo "Protocol compliance test completed"
